HumbleTrust
The Problem · Deep Dive
pump.fun — the numbers don't lie

Out of every 1,000 tokens launched on Solana

Source: Solidus Labs, SolRugDetector arXiv 2025, 7M+ tokens analysed
986 tokens

Rug pulls, pump-and-dumps, or fraud. Liquidity drained to zero within days.

13 tokens

Survive past launch. Only 97K of 7M+ tokens ever held $1,000+ liquidity.

1 token

Migrates to Raydium. Makes it to real liquidity and sustained trading.

Zero safeguards. No on-chain trust signal. Traders fly blind on every single launch.

HumbleTrust
The Problem · Market Damage
What scams do to a blockchain

Solana lost 82% of DEX volume — and 7 million traders

WEEKLY DEX VOLUME ($B)
BeInCrypto, on-chain data 2024–2025
DAILY ACTIVE TRADERS (M)
CryptoNews, on-chain data 2025

LIBRA Token Collapse

$107M drained in liquidity. Associated with $4B in broader market losses. February 2025.

Meme Coin Share Crashed

From 70%+ of all Solana DEX volume in Dec 2024 to under 10% of daily volume by 2025.

7M Users Gone

From 8M+ unique traders at peak to just over 1M. 87% of the user base has left.

HumbleTrust
The Problem · Trust Collapse
The mainstream adoption wall

Trust is the #1 barrier blocking crypto's next billion users

63% of Americans

don't trust crypto as safe or reliable. Pew Research 2024.

82% of non-holders

familiar with crypto still distrust its safety and reliability.

~30% think it's a scam

of people who've never owned crypto believe the entire space is fraudulent.

181,565 complaints

filed with FBI IC3 in 2025 about crypto fraud. Up 21% year-over-year.

The problem isn't blockchain technology. The problem is that there is no trust layer between creators and investors.

HumbleTrust
The Solution
We built the fix

HumbleTrust is the
Trust Layer for Solana

An on-chain protocol that makes trust measurable, transparent, and real-time — before anyone buys a single token.

📊

TrustScore 0–100

Fully on-chain. No oracles. Updates on every trade, vote, and action. Cannot be faked.

🔒

Protected Bonding Curve V2

5-vault model. Creator vesting. Anti-dump mechanics. Rug pulls are structurally impossible.

🏆

NFT Soulbound Certificates

Token-2022 NonTransferable. Every launch gets a cryptographic proof of legitimacy.

🌐

Public API

Any wallet, DEX, or aggregator can query TrustScore for any Solana token. One standard.

HumbleTrust
How It Works
Mechanism Design

From launch to Raydium graduation — every step is scored

🚀

Token Launch

Creator sets vault allocations. Vesting locked. TrustScore starts at 0.

→
📈

Every Trade

Buy/Sell triggers TrustScore update. Volume, holder distribution, consistency all tracked.

→
🗳️

Community Votes

Token holders vote on trust. On-chain. Transparent. Affects score immediately.

→
🎯

50 SOL Threshold

Curve hits 50 SOL → auto-migration to Raydium CPMM. 0.1 SOL reward to caller.

→
🏆

Graduated Token

Full Raydium liquidity. NFT certificate. TrustScore public API. +8 score bonus.

5-Vault Architecture

Locked [L] 30–80% · Creator [C] 0–5% · Curve [Q] 25–50% · Circulation [R] 15–40% · Airdrop [A] 0–5%. Creator cannot dump.

Vesting: 33/33/34%

Creator allocation releases at day 30, 60, 90. Cannot be bypassed. Enforced by smart contract.

TrustScore Formula

Trade consistency + holder distribution + vote ratio + time + migration bonus. 100% on-chain. Zero oracles.

HumbleTrust
Creator Economics
Why creators launch with HumbleTrust

Real earnings, every trade

0.5% on every trade

Encoded in V2 contract: CREATOR_FEE_BPS = 50. Goes directly to creator wallet in SOL. Real-time. No claiming needed.

0.5%
buy + sell

Monthly LP Fees

After Raydium migration: Standard plan 40% of LP fees. Premium plan 60%. Claimed monthly. Passive income.

40–60%
of LP fees

Vesting Allocation

Creator gets 0–5% of token supply. Vests 33%/33%/34% at day 30/60/90. Options: receive, burn, or add to circulation.

0–5%
token supply

Migration Reward

MIGRATION_REWARD = 0.1 SOL to whoever triggers Raydium migration. Incentivises community engagement.

0.1 SOL
per graduation
EXAMPLE: TOKEN WITH 1,000 SOL DAILY VOLUME
Trade fees (daily)5 SOL
Monthly trade fees~150 SOL
LP fees (monthly est.)variable
TRUST = LONGEVITY
Higher TrustScore → more organic trading → more creator revenue. Trust and earnings are aligned.
All values encoded in
CREATOR_FEE_BPS = 50
MIGRATION_REWARD = 100_000_000
V2 smart contract · on-chain · immutable
HumbleTrust
Traction — Built in 3 Months
From zero to devnet alpha

Everything built, everything live

V1 Smart Contract

2,327 lines Rust/Anchor. Bonding curve, TrustScore, LP vesting. Deployed devnet.

V2 Smart Contract

4,643 lines. 5-vault model, real-time creator fees, Metaplex NFTs, Token-2022. Deployed devnet.

Web Application

React + Vite + Tailwind. TrustScore API, launch dashboard, live scores. Live on Vercel.

Chrome Extension

Shows TrustScore overlay on any Solana DEX UI. Real-time protection for traders.

444 NFT Badges

HumbleTrust Zodiac Collection. Soulbound launch certificates. Badge-gated API access.

Stripe Monetisation

Pro plan subscriptions live. API tier system with 50 free / 5,000 Pro / unlimited Enterprise.

PROGRAM V2

Solana Devnet
3
MONTHS
to build all of this
1
FOUNDER
vision + architecture
HumbleTrust
Business Model
Revenue Streams

Multiple revenue streams, one trust standard

API Subscriptions

Free 50 req/day · Pro $29/mo 5,000/day · Enterprise unlimited. TrustScore data for all Solana tokens.

$29 / month

OG NFT Pass

444 badge holders get lifetime API access + premium features. One-time purchase.

Lifetime access

Launch Protocol Fee

0.5% platform fee on every buy/sell through HumbleTrust V2 bonding curve.

0.5% per trade

Premium Plan

Creator Premium: 60% LP fee share (vs 40% standard). Verified badge. Priority TrustScore.

Higher LP share

B2B API Licensing

DEXs, wallets, aggregators embed TrustScore. Every Solana token ever launched becomes scoreable.

Enterprise pricing

NFT Badge Market

Secondary market for Zodiac Badges. Soulbound launch certificates for verified token creators.

2027 roadmap
Revenue mix (projected year 1)

Roadmap
Timeline

3 months built. Mainnet next.

Mar 2026
Foundation
V1 contract, TrustScore engine, web app
DONE
Apr 2026

5-vault model, creator fees, Metaplex NFTs
DONE

● LIVE
Q3 2026
Audit + Mainnet
Security audit, mainnet launch, public API
Q4 2026
B2B Integrations
DEX + wallet partnerships, API licensing
2027
NFT Market
Certificate market, Zodiac secondary market

Next: Security Audit

OtterSec / Neodyme class audit. Most critical step before mainnet. $35K–$55K budget item.

Funding Unlocks Mainnet

Without audit there is no mainnet. This seed round is the single gate between devnet and production.

Market Timing

98.6% rug pull rate on Solana NOW. Trust infrastructure needed yesterday. First mover advantage is real.

HumbleTrust
